title: Planet Labs PBC Stock Forecast and Price Targets
text: Planet Labs PBC has received price target upgrades from multiple analysts reflecting improved visibility and execution. The 12-month average price target among analysts is $35.00. Consensus rating is Buy based on 8 buy ratings and 2 hold ratings. The stock has surged more than 620% over the past year as markets recognize the breadth of its applications in geospatial intelligence and Earth observation. Valuation metrics show the stock trades at 38x trailing sales, reflecting high expectations for AI-driven growth and mission-critical government contracts. This leaves limited room for execution missteps.
